title: Changes in Migrant Workers Orientation under 2002 POEA Rules
content: The POEA is implementing an OWWA Membership Pre-Departure Orientation (PDO) Program as part of the orientation process for migrant workers. This program aims to integrate OWWA membership enrollment with the mandatory pre-departure orientation, ensuring that overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) are informed of their rights, benefits, and services available through OWWA before leaving the country.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
